fields.doc: Canonical account key, '{source_bank}:{source_account_id}'; recomputed and enforced by a model validator
fields.name: account_id

fields.doc: Which bank the account came from
fields.name: source_bank

fields.doc: The bank's own account identifier, verbatim
fields.name: source_account_id

fields.doc: Human-readable account name as reported by the bank
fields.name: display_name

fields.doc: ISO 4217 code of the account currency
fields.name: currency

fields.doc: IBAN when the bank reports one; legacy exports may not
fields.name: iban
